subcodes.first_line: O beloved of spirit and soul! This wondrous and exalted Cause, sanctified above all mention and utterance, and hallowed beyond the allusions of any and all, hath from time immemorial been as a Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبیب روح و جان امر بدیع منیع مقدس از ذکر و بیان است و منزه از اشارۀ این و آن لم‌یزل این شمس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
